title: BTC Managed Exposure Upside-Capture Lead
hypothesis: A graduated BTC core regime with a 100/70/0 exposure ladder can stay much closer to HODL's upside while still improving risk-adjusted metrics and drawdown.

eras.label: 2016 Recovery Base
eras.rationale: Thin-liquidity recovery tape before the 2017 mania acceleration.

eras.label: 2017 Mania
eras.rationale: Captures the first major BTC retail mania and its immediate unwind.

eras.label: 2018-2020 Winter and Recovery
eras.rationale: Stress period for surviving post-mania collapse, chop, and early recovery.

eras.label: 2020-2021 Liquidity Bull
eras.rationale: High-momentum regime that must not dominate the whole edge story.

eras.label: 2021-2022 Bear Reset
eras.rationale: Bear market and shock-reset period where weak trend systems usually give back gains.

eras.label: 2023-2026 Recovery and Current Cycle
eras.rationale: Modern regime for checking whether the edge still behaves sensibly after the 2022 reset.

notes: This fixed comparison reuses the long-history Coinbase BTC/USD dataset that already anchors the crypto research lane.
The benchmark remains perfect buy-and-hold BTC over the exact same tape.
This is a fixed finalist comparison contract, not an open-ended search spec.
The tactical layer is evaluated only as an additive top-up to the graduated core, never as a standalone replacement for managed BTC exposure.

exposure_model.description: Graduated BTC core with a tactical top-up overlay that can lift total exposure to 100% but never override risk-off.

notes: This run should emit a fixed comparison bundle rather than a multi-variant sweep leaderboard.
Uses the same production-minded crypto fee/slippage assumptions as the earlier BTC bench work.
Success is defined as risk-adjusted participation, not beating HODL on raw return.
This upside-capture finalist is expected to stay closer to HODL while still improving risk-adjusted metrics and drawdown.
This is one of the two finalist crypto portfolio-construction candidates.
It represents the strongest current upside-capture version of managed BTC exposure.
